name: Boxing
summary: Reliable combos, high burst, and close-range pressure. Commonly used to extend M1 chains.

name: Kendo

moves.name: Whirlwind
moves.effect: Slash in front hitting everyone in a small area. Guardbreaks

moves.name: Whirlwind (Air)
moves.effect: Two vertical slashes upwards, sends you and opponent upward then knocks them away

moves.name: Silent Edge
moves.effect: Dash forward with sword, if hit unleash a flurry of slashes stunning anyone hit

moves.name: Rising Tempest
moves.effect: Stomp ground, drag opponent upward with 3 slashes, final slash into floor drag and knockaway

summary: Longer reach and counter-attacks. Often paired with fast or sword-based Stands.

name: Karate
summary: Combo extenders with AoE crowd control. Often used in PvE and group fights.
